title: Yahoo JP Nonbrand Experiment — Audience Layering

meta.title: Yahoo JP Nonbrand Experiment — Audience Layering
meta.update-trigger: Yahoo JP NB strategy revisited or audience targeting approach changes
meta.summary: Yahoo JP NB test (Oct-Dec 2022) layering audiences on nonbrand. Overall $1,457 CPA, but competitor subdomain audience achieved $700 CPA with 2x better efficiency — the headline finding.

title: JP Google Nonbrand Experiment — LP Test + Keyword Performance

meta.title: JP Google Nonbrand Experiment — LP Test + Keyword Performance
meta.update-trigger: JP NB strategy revisited or Google NB campaigns relaunched
meta.summary: JP Google NB experiment (Jan-Feb 2023). Callback LP definitively beat Bulk LP (0.9% vs 0.4% CVR, 5.8% Bayesian). 8 registrations at $1,028 CPA. Purchase keywords drove highest volume; custom ad copy outperformed brand/bulk variants.

meta.title: Audience Targeting Post-mortem — LiveRamp Integration
meta.update-trigger: LiveRamp program reactivated or MarTech scoping completes in OP1
meta.summary: Post-mortem on LiveRamp audience targeting program (Q1-Q2 2023), suspended due to US privacy law. Key learnings on match rates, brand term dominance, and landing page alignment.

title: JP App Testing Results — Apple Search Ads

meta.title: JP App Testing Results — Apple Search Ads
meta.update-trigger: JP app marketing strategy revisited or Apple Search Ads relaunched
meta.summary: JP Apple Search Ads test (Aug-Sep 2023). $2,708 spend drove +189% unique impressions and +82% downloads. App regs +12% PoP vs flat market, but YoY trend suggests seasonality, not incrementality. Recommendation: conclude testing.

meta.title: IT City-Level Bid Modifiers Test
meta.update-trigger: Bid modifier strategy rolled to new markets or IT performance data updated
meta.summary: Google Ads experiment in Italy showing +18% registrations and +7% CVR from city-level bid modifiers on NB campaigns, with 83.4% Bayesian PPR.
